case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC VS. JOANNA Q LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-03-2025 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** YOLITA NOWAK, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE FOR FURTHER DISCOVERY. COURT STATES IF COUNSEL IS NOT READY FOR PROVE-UP HEARING, THEN THE CASE IS ORDERED DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
